positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a majestic woodland creature, perhaps a fox or stag, emerging from a tangle of bioluminescent flora. The design should utilize clean, thick lines and sharp, contrasting silhouettes. Focus on strong compositional symmetry, with the central figure dominating the space. Color palette should be deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) against a contrasting muted background (cream or charcoal). Use high contrast, graphic vector art style, intricate yet easily printable detail, designed for textile repeat print.
negative: blur, out of focus, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, graffiti, messy, complex background, photorealistic, 3d render
